Name: oma01rpicls01mstr01
Notes: OS packages upgraded on 2026-04-12; k3s upgraded from v1.28.8+k3s1 to v1.28.15+k3s1; hosts n8n (31789, ns n8n), NetBox (32081, ns netbox), OpenBao (32000, ns openbao), Argo CD (32090, ns argocd), Prometheus (32091, ns observability), Grafana (32030, ns observability), and OpenCost (32093, ns opencost). Loki is internal-only in observability namespace. ESO runs in external-secrets namespace; cert-manager in cert-manager. Falco (ns falco) and Velero+MinIO (ns velero) are deployed and healthy.
